meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Stop Stalling: Use Antigravity Templates to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with incomplete projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional SaaS apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from decision paralysis and boilerplate fatigue. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, eliminating setup friction. Combined with Claude Code, you automate the repetitive implementation tasks, allowing you to focus exclusively on high-value business logic and rapid client delivery.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished repo, the GitHub commit graph is a graveyard of abandoned ideas, and the deadline is looming like a storm cloud. Every freelance project starts with the same adrenaline-fueled sprint, only to die in the doldrums of architecture indecision and endless boilerplate configuration. It’s not a lack of talent; it’s a failure of systems.

True velocity isn't about typing faster; it’s about removing the friction between your intent and the production server. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural skeleton, providing the hardened foundation you need to bypass the 'blank page' phase and move straight into building features that actually pay the bills.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Skeleton
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure to ensure modularity from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Bootstrap a new project structure using the Antigravity production-ready template, including TypeScript, standard middleware, and environment management.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with LLM Assistance
steps.description: Use Claude to map out your database schema based on your project requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and generate the Prisma schema and DTOs within the Antigravity structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate models based on requirements.txt"

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Generate REST or tRPC endpoints based on your newly created domain models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the CRUD API routes for the User and Project entities using the standard Antigravity controller pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create api endpoints for models"

steps.title: Integrate Authentication Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application using pre-configured security patterns provided by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement JWT authentication and role-based access control using the built-in Antigravity auth provider.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "add auth middleware to all /api routes"

steps.title: Execute Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Ship your progress to a staging environment to maintain momentum and client visibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment script for Vercel/AWS within the existing Antigravity CI/CD pipeline.

pro_tips: Treat your Antigravity template as a living document—commit your own custom utility functions back into your local template repo to make future projects faster.
Use Claude Code's `--watch` mode to have it suggest refactors in real-time as you modify the Antigravity boilerplate.
Always define your 'Done' criteria in a prompt file inside the root directory so Claude can track progress against your specific deliverables.
Bypass frontend styling fatigue by asking Antigravity to inject Tailwind components directly from your preferred UI library during the setup phase.
Never manually write boilerplate; if you find yourself writing the same code twice, turn it into a custom Antigravity scaffold command.
content.next_steps: Once your initial build is deployed, identify the one core feature that provides 80% of the value and prioritize its completion to secure client sign-off.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects drain your potential and your bank account. By mastering the Antigravity template, you gain the repeatable system required to scale your freelance business into a high-output agency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
